commit_scope: Add a minimal kernel-core self source body in BML and a sibling-kernel Form proof that parses the source, builds a KERNEL-CORE-IMAGE, executes witness recipes, observes NodeID/category/children identity, and round-trips the image through .fkb.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/kernel-core-self-proof.fk
git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
local_validation.notes: Dedicated worktree prompt gate passed on codex/kernel-core-self-20260609. The branch is rebased onto origin/main. The focused kernel-core proof returns 43 with 1 ok, 0 divergent across Go, Rust, and TypeScript kernels. Evidence validation, diff check, local PR guard, followthrough guard, and wellness pass. The proof writes /tmp/kernel-core-self-image.fkb and reads it back, proving image identity without committing an ignored .cache artifact.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: No deploy attempted for this Form runtime source/proof slice.

phase_gate.notes: Local focused proof, evidence validation, rebase, local PR guard, followthrough guard, and wellness pass. Commit, push, PR, and remote CI remain pending.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A new kernel-core self source body is expressible in BML and verifiable through Form/kernel primitives. The proof establishes the minimal core as source-observable, executable, and trustable by sibling-kernel agreement rather than by a host-language parser path.
test_flows: BML source parser sees KernelCorePrimitive, KernelCoreImage, and KernelCoreSelf member bodies after the bounded class-body whitelist is extended.
KERNEL-CORE-IMAGE resolves through the generated bp tables in Go, Rust, and TypeScript.
The proof builds math, compare, logic, conditional, and block recipes with intern_node and executes them through walk_recipe.
The proof observes native attribution for intern_node, walk_recipe, node_children, and node_category through native_blueprint.
The proof writes and reads /tmp/kernel-core-self-image.fkb and verifies loaded NodeID/category/child values.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/bml/kernel-core.bml names KernelCoreObservable, KernelCorePrimitive, KernelCoreImage, and KernelCoreSelf as the minimal source body.
form/form-stdlib/tests/kernel-core-self-proof.fk parses the BML source and proves the kernel-core self through 43 assertions.
form/form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk extends the bounded source-model body whitelist to KernelCoreObservable, KernelCorePrimitive, KernelCoreImage, and KernelCoreSelf.
Generated bp tables in Go, Rust, and TypeScript include KERNEL-CORE-IMAGE so sibling kernels resolve the same NodeID.

Focused validation: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk form-stdlib/tests/kernel-core-self-proof.fk -> 43; 1 ok, 0 divergent.
